_comment: SOC / Security-Operations Agent — MCP tool manifest (tools[].inputSchema).

tools.name: query_siem_alerts
tools.description: Read and list open alerts from the SIEM for triage.

tools.name: run_shell_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command on a managed endpoint to collect forensic evidence.

tools.name: read_secret_vault
tools.description: Retrieve a credential or API token from the secrets vault for an investigation.

tools.name: isolate_host
tools.description: Change firewall policy to quarantine a compromised host from the network.

tools.name: grant_iam_role
tools.description: Grant or escalate an IAM role for a responder during an incident.

tools.name: disable_audit_logging
tools.description: Temporarily disable audit logging on a host during maintenance.

tools.name: post_threat_intel
tools.description: Publish an indicator-of-compromise to an external threat-intel sharing API.

tools.name: enrich_indicator
tools.description: Look up reputation data for an IP or hash (read-only enrichment).
